name: dash0-agent-plugin
description: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

OTLP_URL.title: OTLP Endpoint URL (optional)
OTLP_URL.description: Override the Dash0 OTLP endpoint URL (e.g. https://ingress.us1.dash0.com:4318). Leave blank to use the ingestion URL recorded by /dash0-agent-plugin:login.

AUTH_TOKEN.title: Auth Token (optional — use /dash0-agent-plugin:login instead)
AUTH_TOKEN.description: Dash0 authentication token. Prefer running /dash0-agent-plugin:login; only set this manually for CI or shared environments where the browser flow is not possible.

AUTH_URL.title: OAuth Authorization Server URL (advanced)
AUTH_URL.description: Override the OAuth authorization server used by /dash0-agent-plugin:login. Defaults to the Dash0 regional API derived from OTLP_URL (e.g. https://api.eu-west-1.aws.dash0.com). Only set this for non-standard Dash0 deployments.

AGENT_NAME.title: Agent Name
AGENT_NAME.description: Agent name, used as service.name (optional, defaults to claude-code)

OMIT_USER_INFO.title: Anonymize User Identity
OMIT_USER_INFO.description: When true (default), hashes user.name and omits user.email. Set to false to include real identity.

OMIT_IO.title: Omit Prompts & Tool I/O
OMIT_IO.description: When true (default), omits prompt content and tool call inputs/outputs. Set to false to include full content.
